heroEyebrow: Clinical Herbalist · Naturopath · Former Elite Athlete
heroDesc: I work with women who are tired of being dismissed. With athletes whose bodies have stopped cooperating. With anyone who suspects there is a different way — and needs someone who has walked that road themselves.
introBody: Rooted in clinical Western herbalism and naturopathy, with training in TCM and Indian head massage. Every consultation is built around you — your history, your patterns, your goals.
